'''dhozafaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:rubberist|rubberist]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-z-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rubberist|rubberist]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dhozafaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhozafithi|dhozafithi]] || [[word:dhozafiji|dhozafiji]] || [[word:dhozafishi|dhozafishi]] || [[word:dhozafiki|dhozafiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhozafuthuthu|dhozafuthuthu]] || [[word:dhozafujuju|dhozafujuju]] || [[word:dhozafushushu|dhozafushushu]] || [[word:dhozafukuku|dhozafukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhozafuthu|dhozafuthu]] || [[word:dhozafuju|dhozafuju]] || [[word:dhozafushu|dhozafushu]] || [[word:dhozafuku|dhozafuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhozafufthuf|dhozafufthuf]] || [[word:dhozafufjuf|dhozafufjuf]] || [[word:dhozafufshuf|dhozafufshuf]] || [[word:dhozafufkuf|dhozafufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhozafethe|dhozafethe]] || [[word:dhozafeje|dhozafeje]] || [[word:dhozafeshe|dhozafeshe]] || [[word:dhozafeke|dhozafeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhozafothotho|dhozafothotho]] || [[word:dhozafojojo|dhozafojojo]] || [[word:dhozafoshosho|dhozafoshosho]] || [[word:dhozafokoko|dhozafokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhozafotho|dhozafotho]] || [[word:dhozafojo|dhozafojo]] || [[word:dhozafosho|dhozafosho]] || [[word:dhozafoko|dhozafoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhozafofthof|dhozafofthof]] || [[word:dhozafofjof|dhozafofjof]] || [[word:dhozafofshof|dhozafofshof]] || [[word:dhozafofkof|dhozafofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhozafĂŻfthĂŻf|dhozafĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhozafĂŻfjĂŻf|dhozafĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhozafĂŻfshĂŻf|dhozafĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhozafĂŻfkĂŻf|dhozafĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhozafĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|dhozafĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhozafĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|dhozafĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhozafĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|dhozafĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhozafĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|dhozafĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhozafĂŻfthĂŻf|dhozafĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhozafĂŻfjĂŻf|dhozafĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhozafĂŻfshĂŻf|dhozafĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhozafĂŻfkĂŻf|dhozafĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhozafĂŻfthĂŻf|dhozafĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhozafĂŻfjĂŻf|dhozafĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhozafĂŻfshĂŻf|dhozafĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhozafĂŻfkĂŻf|dhozafĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhozafĂŠthĂŠ|dhozafĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:dhozafĂŠjĂŠ|dhozafĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:dhozafĂŠshĂŠ|dhozafĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:dhozafĂŠkĂŠ|dhozafĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhozafathatha|dhozafathatha]] || [[word:dhozafajaja|dhozafajaja]] || [[word:dhozafashasha|dhozafashasha]] || [[word:dhozafakaka|dhozafakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhozafatha|dhozafatha]] || [[word:dhozafaja|dhozafaja]] || [[word:dhozafasha|dhozafasha]] || [[word:dhozafaka|dhozafaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhozafafthaf|dhozafafthaf]] || [[word:dhozafafjaf|dhozafafjaf]] || [[word:dhozafafshaf|dhozafafshaf]] || [[word:dhozafafkaf|dhozafafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:dhozafasha|dhozafasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhozafshĂ«sha|dhozafshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhozafrosha|dhozafrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhozafmusha|dhozafmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhozafyasha|dhozafyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhozafnkshĂ«sha|godhozafnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhozafnkrosha|godhozafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhozafnkmusha|godhozafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhozafnkyasha|godhozafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:dhozazafasha|dhozazafasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhozazafshĂ«sha|dhozazafshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhozazafrosha|dhozazafrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhozazafmusha|dhozazafmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhozazafyasha|dhozazafyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhozazafnkshĂ«sha|godhozazafnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhozazafnkrosha|godhozazafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhozazafnkmusha|godhozazafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhozazafnkyasha|godhozazafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:dhezĂŠfasha|dhezĂŠfasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhezĂŠfshĂ«sha|dhezĂŠfshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhezĂŠfrosha|dhezĂŠfrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhezĂŠfmusha|dhezĂŠfmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhezĂŠfyasha|dhezĂŠfyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhezĂŠfnkshĂ«sha|godhezĂŠfnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhezĂŠfnkrosha|godhezĂŠfnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhezĂŠfnkmusha|godhezĂŠfnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhezĂŠfnkyasha|godhezĂŠfnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:dhozfafasha|dhozfafasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhozfafshĂ«sha|dhozfafshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhozfafrosha|dhozfafrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhozfafmusha|dhozfafmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhozfafyasha|dhozfafyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhozfafnkshĂ«sha|godhozfafnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhozfafnkrosha|godhozfafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhozfafnkmusha|godhozfafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhozfafnkyasha|godhozfafnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
